ITHE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIICOLفلفلل Civil Revision Appln No S- 11 of 2009 Abdul Rchman Mahar Applicant Versus Province ut Sindh & uthers, Respondents Syed Aijaz Ali Shah Advocate for the Messrs Prem Chand and Safdar Ali Chouri Advocates for respondents No. Mr Ali Akbar Kalhoro, State Counscl Date of hearing 10.11.2015 Date of Judgment 10.11,2015 IUDGMENI ZAFAKAHMEDRAIPUT I This civil IEVISIOn under Section 115 CPC, is directed against the judgment and decree dated 30.03.2009 and 07 U4ZDU9, respectively whereby the lcarned 1س Additional District Judge Shikarpur while allowing Civil Appeal No13/ZOU5 (Re; Dr, Iqbal Nabi and others vs Province uf Sindh and others) modified the judement and decree dated 24,12.2004 and 01.01.2005 respectively passed by the learned 1st Senior Civil Judge Shikarpur in F C Suit N0.15/1995. Precisely stated the facts of the case are that thc respondents No 6 to 8/ plaintiffs filed civil suit bearing No15/I995 betore the Court 1 Senior Civil Judge Shikarpur Iع applicant dcfendant N٥ and respondents No1 to 5/ defendant Ns and alleging therein that one Mian Abdul Ghafoor owned agricultural upplicant againsi land bearing No. 516 (3-24) acres situated in Deh Rais Wah Tapo Baid, Taluka and District Shikarpur the Suit Land which he sold 0ut tu thgir predecessor namely late Nabi Bux Soomro along with land bearing No.130 (3-04) acres, under registered sale deed dated 31.5.1967 the consideration Rs 2000/ and handed ؟1 ٥٧٤٢ possession to him; later after completing the requisite formalities the ٧٥١٦٧١؟٢ record of the suit land was mutated in his favour, vide Dakhal Kharij entry No17466, dated 19 41977 It has further been averred that Waheed Ahmed Jhullan the respondent N0.6/ defendant N0.5 fraudulently and with connivanCe IUVEnu٤ staff gut above mentioned both the survey numbers mutated in his favour on showing that late Nabi Bux Soomro had sold out the land to him through statement of sale dated 1621984 before the Mukhtiarkar Shikarpur and; thereafter he sold out the suit land to Abdul Ghaffar and others illegally under registered sale d٤٤d and basis thereor the record of rights و8 mutated in their names Being aggrieved by the illegal mutation entries, late Nabi Bux Soumro moved an application to the respondent / defendant No 3 (Deputy Commissioner Shikarpur) the cancellation of mutation and ultimately mutation made favour Of Abdul Ghaffar and others was cancelled the suit land was restored in the name uf late Nabi Bux Soomro Itis the case of the respondents No6 to that during the pendency uf the application of late Nabi Bux Soomro before respondent N6.3, the applicant / dcfendant No,5 moved application the respondent N0.3 challenging the sale of suit land and the mutation entry dated 19.4.1977 ٨٨d
